---
title: "Blog"
subtitle: "A little bit of everything | Un poco de todo"
image: blog-photo.jpg
about: 
  template: marquee
  image-shape: rectangle
listing:
  contents: blog
  feed: true
  sort: "date desc"
  type: grid
  date-format: medium
---


**EN:** Here I will be depositing several articles of very diverse topics.

**ES:** Aquí iré depositando contenido sobre temas muy diversos.

Image credits: Gunnar Ridderström at [Unplash](https://unsplash.com/es/fotos/un-colorido-puesto-de-mercado-rebosante-de-frutos-secos-y-nueces-Kv4jY4fLoqc?utm_source=unsplash&utm_medium=referral&utm_content=creditShareLink)
